The total beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of three CCW variables: patient pay amount 
(PTNT_PAY_AMT), other troop amount (OTHER_TROOP_AMT), and patient liability reduction due to 
other payer amount (PLRO_AMT) for Part D drugs for the relevant PDEs.

LONG NAME: PTD_BENE_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived)
